prestazioni: Engine: B18C5 (1.8L DOHC VTEC, 8,400 RPM redline, 195 HP stock) – Full forged internals with JE 87mm forged pistons (9.0:1 compression), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and ACL Race Series bearings for 12,000 RPM reliability. Paired with a TODA Racing Type-R spec camshaft set (272° duration, 12.5mm lift) and Ferrea Competition Series valve springs/retainers.

Forced Induction: Custom-built Garrett GTX3071R Gen II turbo kit (0.63 A/R turbine housing) with a PTE 46mm wastegate, custom 3.5" stainless steel intercooler piping, and a GReddy Type-S intercooler (700whp core). Fuel system upgraded with a Walbro 450 LPH in-tank pump, ID1000x injectors, and a Radium Engineering fuel pressure regulator for E85 compatibility.

Drivetrain: OS Giken Super Lock LSD (4.785 final drive) with a Spec Stage 4+ clutch and billet flywheel. Transmission synchros replaced with Synchrotech carbon fiber synchros, and the gearbox reinforced with a PPG close-ratio gear set (1st: 2.916, 2nd: 2.176, 3rd: 1.714). Axles upgraded to Driveshaft Shop 3.5" chromoly axles with custom CV joints.
estetica: Body: Veilside Fortune 99 widebody kit (JDM-spec, 3-piece front fenders, rear quarter panels, and rear bumper) with custom carbon fiber overfenders. Front lip replaced with a Mugen RR-style carbon fiber lip (JDM-spec, 3-piece) and rear diffuser from Rocket Bunny (Pandem) for the DC5 chassis.

Aero: Custom 1000mm carbon fiber wing (inspired by the 1999 JGTC Integra, fabricated by Autozine) mounted on custom aluminum pedestals. Hood replaced with a Seibon carbon fiber Type-R hood (DC2R-style, vented) with a custom heat extractor duct for the turbo system. Side skirts from the JDM Integra Type R Spoon Sports aero kit (discontinued).

Interior: Full Bride Leggenda II reclinable bucket seats (JDM-spec, red Alcantara) with custom Takata 4-point harnesses. Momo Prototipo steering wheel (350mm, suede) on a NRG quick-release hub. Custom roll cage by Cusco (8-point, bolt-in, chromoly) with integrated harness bar. Gauges replaced with a Defi Advance BF series 5-gauge cluster (oil temp, oil pressure, boost, wideband AFR, and water temp) mounted in a custom carbon fiber gauge pod.
